name: Special k Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the sugar and corn syrup.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Continue boiling for one minute without stirring.
4. Gradually stir in the peanut butter until smooth.
5. Add the vanilla extract.
6. Slowly add the cereal, mixing well after each addition.
7. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
8. Allow to cool before storing or serving.
These cookies freeze well.
